landing.heroDescription: The free browser editor that makes your screenshots, tweets, and code snippets look professional. Add Safari and Chrome browser mockups, 3D effects, and more.
landing.whatIsDescription: Screenshot Studio is a free, browser-based screenshot editor that transforms plain screenshots into professional-quality graphics. It offers 100+ gradient backgrounds, Safari and Chrome browser mockups, 3D perspective effects, animation timelines with 20+ presets, and video export in MP4, WebM, and GIF formats. No signup, no watermarks, no downloads required.
landing.whatIsDescription2: Built as an open-source alternative to paid tools like Pika Style, Shots.so, and CleanShot X, Screenshot Studio is used by developers, marketers, and designers to create polished images for social media, landing pages, documentation, and presentations.
landing.keyFeaturesDescription: Gradient backgrounds, browser frames, 3D transforms, text overlays, tweet capture, code snippets, animation editor, video export
landing.howItWorksDescription: Drag and drop any screenshot, choose a style or preset, then export as PNG, JPG, or video. Everything runs in your browser — nothing is uploaded to a server.
landing.readyDescription: Join thousands of creators making beautiful images.
landing.footerDescription: The free browser-based screenshot editor. Beautify images with backgrounds, frames, 3D effects, and animations.

about.title: About Screenshot Studio
about.intro: Screenshot Studio is a free, open-source screenshot editor built for developers, designers, and marketers who want their images to look professional — without paying for expensive tools or signing up for yet another account.
about.whyDescription: Every time you share a screenshot on social media, in documentation, or on a landing page, presentation matters. But existing tools either cost too much, require signups, add watermarks, or upload your images to their servers. We wanted something better — a tool that runs entirely in your browser, respects your privacy, and is completely free to use.
about.backgroundsDescription: Gradient backgrounds, solid colors, and patterns to make your screenshots pop.
about.browserMockupsDescription: Safari and Chrome browser frames for realistic app previews.
about.effectsAnimationsDescription: Perspective transforms, shadows, and animation timelines with video export.
about.tweetCodeDescription: Turn tweets and code snippets into beautiful shareable images.
about.openSourceDescription: Screenshot Studio is fully open source. You can view, contribute to, or fork the project on
about.openSourceSuffix: We believe the best tools are built in the open.
about.builtBySuffix: If you find Screenshot Studio useful, consider starring the repo or sharing it with others.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have a question, found a bug, or want to suggest a feature? Here are the best ways to reach us.
contact.reportBugDescription: Found something broken? Open an issue on GitHub and we'll look into it.
contact.requestFeatureDescription: Have an idea to make Screenshot Studio better? We'd love to hear it.
contact.twitterDescription: Follow for updates, tips, and behind-the-scenes. DMs are open.
contact.emailDescription: For anything else, drop us an email and we'll get back to you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overviewDescription: Screenshot Studio is a browser-based image editor. Your images and edits are processed entirely in your browser — we do not upload, store, or have access to any images you edit.
privacy.collectDescription: We collect minimal information to improve the service:
privacy.analyticsDescription: Page views, feature usage patterns, and general interaction data via privacy-respecting analytics.
privacy.feedbackDescription: If you voluntarily submit feedback through our widget, we collect the message content and optionally your email.
privacy.technicalDescription: Browser type, screen resolution, and operating system for compatibility improvements.
privacy.notCollect1: Your screenshots or images (they never leave your device)
privacy.localStorageDescription: We use browser local storage to save your editor preferences (aspect ratio, export settings, etc.) so your workflow is preserved between sessions. This data stays on your device and can be cleared at any time through your browser settings.
privacy.thirdPartyDescription: We may use privacy-focused analytics (such as Vercel Analytics) to understand how the tool is used. These services do not track individual users across websites and comply with GDPR.
privacy.openSourceDescription: Screenshot Studio is open source. You can inspect exactly what data is collected by reviewing our
privacy.changesDescription: We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date.
privacy.contactDescription: If you have questions about this policy, reach out via our

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.acceptanceDescription: By accessing and using Screenshot Studio ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service.
terms.descriptionText: Screenshot Studio is a free, browser-based screenshot editing tool that allows users to beautify screenshots with backgrounds, frames, effects, and more. The tool processes images entirely within your browser — no images are uploaded to our servers.
terms.useDescription: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes. You may not:
terms.use1: Use the Service to create or distribute harmful content
terms.use2: Attempt to interfere with the Service's operation or security
terms.use3: Reverse-engineer the Service beyond what the open-source license permits
terms.use4: Use the Service in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations
terms.ipDescription: The images you create with Screenshot Studio belong to you. We claim no ownership or rights over content you produce using the tool. The Screenshot Studio software itself is open source and licensed under the terms specified in our
terms.disclaimerDescription: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components.
terms.liabilityDescription: In no event shall Screenshot Studio or its creator be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of the Service.
terms.changesDescription: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
